title: RefreshTokenDevice
description: Device used while issuing/exchanging the refresh token

initial_ip.description: First IP address associated with the refresh token

initial_asn.description: First autonomous system number associated with the refresh token

initial_user_agent.description: First user agent associated with the refresh token

last_ip.description: Last IP address associated with the refresh token

last_asn.description: Last autonomous system number associated with the refresh token

last_user_agent.description: Last user agent associated with the refresh token
